body: Anna, it was wonderful catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — your remarks on the infrastructure bottlenecks in grid-scale storage really stuck with me. I've been thinking a lot about a company in our current diligence pipeline, [VoltPath](companies/voltpath), which is attacking exactly the transmission software layer you flagged as underinvested. They're pre-Series A, strong technical founders out of NREL, and the market thesis feels tight — I'd love to get your read on whether the timing makes sense given what you're seeing from the growth stage side. Would you have 30 minutes sometime the week of August 18th for a quick call? As always, your perspective means a great deal to me, and I don't take lightly how much you've shaped the way I think about these infrastructure bets.
